raw_source_reread_reason: The parent batch already preserved the bounded stochastic diagnostic strip, the duplicated-token boolean detector seam, the four-surface stress emitter, the inert collapse metric, the source-based purity-preservation inference, and the explicit proof-family boundary.
reasons_for_candidate_status: The mega strip is the next bounded residual diagnostic family after the completed ultra-big orphan handoff.
Its boolean detector seam is reusable only if duplicated evidence-token reuse stays separate from full file identity collapse.
Its stress emitter is reusable only if scale expansion, inert collapse, and preservation-biased source structure are all preserved together.
Its proof-boundary value depends on keeping deterministic witness logic outside the stochastic diagnostic strip.
reasons_for_quarantine: Local SIM_EVIDENCE emission is not treated as catalog or top-level evidence-pack admission.
The boolean detectors are not collapsed into one identical detector surface.
The four-surface stress emitter is not promoted into a distinct physics family.
The collapse label is not treated as a live measured discriminator.
Source-based purity-preservation inference is not treated as runtime proof or merged with the deterministic proof family.
